_doc: Dhātupāṭha upadeśa stub. Real engine should load the full 2000+ entries from Brahma Datt Jijñāsu's Prathamāvṛtti. Each entry's 'upadesha' is the raw SLP1 form WITH it-markers; the 1.3.2–1.3.9 prakaraṇa strips them at derivation time to yield the pure dhātu.

entries.meaning: क्रीडायां विजिगीषायां व्यवहारे द्युतौ स्तुतौ मोदे मदे स्वप्ने कान्तौ गतिषु च
